summary: Threat level CRITICAL: an active scam call is linked to a fraud ring operating in Jamtara and a counterfeit note was seized in the same area. Overlapping signals across independent detection systems indicate a coordinated operation.

recommended_actions: Request account freezes for 5 accounts in ring_09 (round-tripping cycle).
Notify the telecom provider to flag/block the originating number.
Alert bank branches in the affected district to re-verify deposits.
Escalate the correlated intelligence package to the district cybercrime cell.
